name: The Offer
description: Doss has repairs, credit, and a problem shaped like a solution to yours: one crate, one blockade, one landing field on Earth that doesn't appear on manifests. Beat 5 of the Duskway Run demo. The credit amount lives on this file — tune it here.

stages.objective: Find Doss at the dock office — she has a way out of this hole
Spend Doss's credit at the Outfitting counter — armor, guns, drive work, or gadgets. There is no right loadout. Undock when you're committed.

epilogue.failure: The deal dies on the table, and the crate goes back into Doss's ledger to wait for a braver ship.
